RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0005 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: John Khan Date of Birth: 18/06/1982 SSN (tokenized): TKN-708142 Annual Income: $61,000 Employer: Globex Loan Amount: $40,000 Term (months): 36 Branch: Dublin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN69972AL Toyota Model 3 2019 ICE New 26,000 VIN94906AL Toyota 320i 2023 EV Used 55,000 Authorized Signature: John Khan
